item.title: 使用 Amazon CodeWhisperer 加速您的编码工作流程 | Accelerate Your Coding Workflow with Amazon CodeWhisperer
item.author: hiader

item.title: 使用 Amazon CodeWhisperer 加速您的编码工作流程 | Accelerate Your Coding Workflow with Amazon CodeWhisperer
item.description:
海德代码哈希

发表于 6 月 1 日

它旨在帮助开发人员更快、更安全地创建应用程序。 根据您的评论和现有代码，CodeWhisperer 已经接受了数十亿行代码的培训，可以创建从片段到整个函数的代码建议。 它允许您从 15 种编程语言（包括 Python、Java 和 JavaScript）以及您喜欢的集成开发环境 (IDE)（例如 Visual Studio Code、IntelliJ IDEA、AWS Cloud9、AWS Lambda 控制台）中进行选择，从而适应您的工作流程、JupyterLab 和 Amazon SageMaker Studio。
如果在开发过程的早期发现问题，开发人员可以在代码发布之前进行修改。 该程序节省了时间和金钱，因为部署后纠正错误的成本要高得多。 该计划也有利于亚马逊消费者。 亚马逊可以通过发现和纠正安全漏洞来维护客户数据的安全。 实时代码推荐交付：

适应您的工作流程：

灵活性是必不可少的，CodeWhisperer 认识到这一点。 它提供了 15 种不同的编程语言，包括 Python、Java 和 JavaScript 等知名语言，供开发人员选择。 它还可以轻松连接您选择的集成开发环境 (IDE)，包括 Visual Studio Code、IntelliJ IDEA、AWS Cloud9、AWS Lambda 控制台、JupyterLab 和 Amazon SageMaker Studio。 由于其多功能性，CodeWhisperer 将符合您的编码品味并改进您当前的流程。

提高代码质量并减少错误：

要使软件项目取得成功，代码质量至关重要。 开发人员可以通过接收潜在缺陷和优化建议的实时反馈，在开发过程的早期发现并修复问题。 由于部署后修复错误的成本要高得多，因此这种主动策略既节省了时间又节省了金钱。 此外，CodeWhisperer 通过负责代码分析来帮助工程师，让他们有时间专注于其他重要任务。
在这里阅读更多！

一旦暂停，haidercodehach 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，haidercodehach 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，haidercodehach 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 haidercodehach 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 haidercodehach 的方法：

降低 haidercodehach 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 haidercodehach 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Haidercodehach

Posted on Jun 1

Amazon CodeWhisperer is a machine learning-powered code generator that delivers real-time code recommendations. It is intended to help developers create apps more quickly and securely. Based on your comments and existing code, CodeWhisperer has been trained on billions of lines of code and can create code suggestions ranging from snippets to whole functions. It adapts to your workflow by allowing you to choose from 15 programming languages, including Python, Java, and JavaScript, as well as your preferred integrated development environments (IDEs), such as Visual Studio Code, IntelliJ IDEA, AWS Cloud9, AWS Lambda console, JupyterLab, and Amazon SageMaker Studio.
CodeWhisperer is critical for increasing code quality and minimizing mistake risk. Developers can make modifications before the code is released if problems are identified early in the development process. The program saves time and money because correcting faults after deployment is far more expensive. The program is also beneficial to Amazon consumers. Amazon can maintain the security of client data by discovering and correcting security flaws. CodeWhisperer may help developers by offering real-time feedback on potential flaws, optimization ideas, and allowing them to focus on other activities while CodeWhisperer handles code analysis.

Real-Time Code Recommendations Delivery:

CodeWhisperer can offer ideas for code that range from snippets to entire functions since it has been educated on trillions of lines of code. CodeWhisperer analyses the code as developers write it in real-time and provides pertinent ideas to improve their productivity. CodeWhisperer has you covered whether you need to write functions, call APIs, style code, or even write comments. Adapting to Your Workflow:

Flexibility is essential, and CodeWhisperer is cognizant of this. It offers 15 different programming languages, including well-known ones like Python, Java, and JavaScript, for developers to select from. It also effortlessly interfaces with the integrated development environments (IDEs) of your choice, including Visual Studio Code, IntelliJ IDEA, AWS Cloud9, AWS Lambda console, JupyterLab, and Amazon SageMaker Studio. Because of its versatility, CodeWhisperer will match your coding tastes and improve your current process.

Increasing Code Quality and Reducing Errors:

For a software project to be successful, code quality is essential. The use of CodeWhisperer is essential for improving code quality and reducing error risk. Developers may find and fix problems early in the development process by receiving real-time feedback on potential defects and optimization suggestions. Since fixing errors after deployment is far more expensive, this proactive strategy saves both time and money. Additionally, CodeWhisperer helps engineers by taking care of code analysis, freeing them up to concentrate on other important tasks.
Read more HERE!!!

Once suspended, haidercodehach will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, haidercodehach will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by haidercodehach will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If haidercodehach is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag haidercodehach:

Make all posts by haidercodehach less visible

haidercodehach consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging haidercodehach will restore default visibility to their posts.
